name: Read Lattice Data
description: Reads a single value from the lattice at any resolvable path (workspace, /o/, /v/, /a/<hash>, DID URL). Path is '/'-separated and may also be a JSON array for pre-typed keys. Returns {exists, value}. If the value exceeds maxSize bytes (default 1MB), returns {exists: true, truncated: true, size} — fall back to covia_slice for paginated access or covia_inspect for budget-controlled rendering. See system prompt for namespace prefixes.

path.description: Any resolvable lattice path (e.g. 'w/my-notes', 'o/my-op', 'v/ops/json/merge', '/a/<hash>', 'did:web:...', 'g/my-agent/state'). Deep paths walk into nested maps and vectors.

maxSize.description: Maximum memory size in bytes for the returned value (default 1000000). If exceeded, returns truncated: true with the size.

exists.description: True if data exists at this path

value.description: The value at the path, or null if not found or truncated

truncated.description: True if the value was too large and was not returned

size.description: Memory size in bytes (only present when truncated)
